title: Bonolota's Garden
description: A dreamlike acrylic study of a courtyard garden at dusk, where hibiscus blooms fold into human silhouettes. Layered brushwork in deep magenta and gold.

title: Monsoon Circuit
description: A surreal digital portrait fusing rain-soaked rickshaw lights with fragmented glass reflections. Part of the artist's 'City Static' series.

title: Clay Whisperer
description: A hand-built terracotta figure mid-gesture, glazed in warm ochres. Inspired by potters of Old Dhaka and the rhythm of the wheel.

title: Lalbagh Reverie
description: An oil-on-canvas reimagining of Lalbagh Fort wrapped in floating banyan leaves and birds, blending heritage architecture with folk motifs.
